welcometosolana.xyz

Purpose: A community-run migration guide for Cosmos ecosystem users moving to Solana. Includes a step-by-step migration guide and a curated Solana ecosystem directory (categories and project links).

Canonical: https://welcometosolana.xyz/
Sitemap: https://welcometosolana.xyz/sitemap.xml

Key pages:
- Home: https://welcometosolana.xyz/
